content.en:
"The god will be fourth on the list!"

When the Yun Zi Divine Maiden saw Ye Tian's ranking on the Divine General List, she was immediately shocked.

Originally, the fourth place on the list of god generals belonged to the lifeless god generals, and it was also the first on the list of god generals in the past, and at that time, Ye Tian was not even qualified to enter the god general list.

But now, Ye Tian surpassed the lifeless god general and became the first person under the eight-star god general.

"The strength of the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi has improved too quickly, right?"

The Yun Zi Divine Maiden was surprised.

She thought that her strength had improved very quickly, and she had obtained the Ice-Free Fire, and during this time, she had improved faster and faster, and she had also reached the peak of the seven-star god general's combat power.

If she is given another 100,000 years, she can completely cultivate that physique to the Dacheng realm, coupled with the breakthrough in the Chaos Alchemy Technique, her strength will definitely be able to achieve an eight-star god general.

"Wanfa Daozi should have practiced Chaos Divine Power, plus there is a breakthrough in Chaos Alchemy, but there is a big gap between the seven-star peak god general and the eight-star god general, and it is impossible for Wanfa Daozi to improve so quickly. I still have a chance to surpass him, continue to retreat, and strive to surpass him and become an eight-star god general!"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden said secretly.

-----------

"Lack of chaos supernatural powers!"

Ye Tian was very worried.

The cultivation of the Xuan Xuan Jue is not in a hurry, it takes a long time to break through, and many of the divine generals who have reached his level cannot be improved, even if they want to improve a little, it will take millions or even tens of millions of years, hundreds of millions of years.

Ye Tian's talent is very high, and there is no shortage of resources, but if he wants to improve his strength to an eight-star god general with the Xuanxuan Technique, it is estimated that it will take hundreds of thousands or even millions of years.

He couldn't wait so long, if there was enough Chaos Divine Power for him to cultivate, he would definitely be able to rush into the eight-star divine general within tens of thousands of years.

"We must collect the Chaos Powers again!"

Ye Tian decided.

Immediately, he leaked the news that he had a lot of obsidian on him, and offered to exchange the obsidian for the Chaos Divine Power and the corresponding innate origin of the transaction.

All of a sudden, countless powerhouses in the Great Universe noticed Ye Tian.

Many people were greedy, and they were very curious about how much obsidian gold Ye Tian had obtained, but few of them really dared to snatch it.

Without him, just because Ye Tian's identity is not ordinary, it is the inheritance of the Taoist ancestor.

Who dares to snatch a Dao Ancestor's personal inheritance, unless there are some special worlds that even Dao Ancestors can't peep into, or the background is very large, and it is also a Dao Ancestor's personal inheritance and descendants, so they are not afraid of a Dao Ancestor, otherwise if they really snatch a Dao Ancestor's personal inheritance, they will die.

However, nothing is absolute.

In the chaos, there are really some people who will take risks and attack the Dao ancestors.

There is an agreement between Dao Ancestors, and they will not make a move easily, so even if the Dao Ancestor is dead, the Dao Ancestor will not be able to make a move, otherwise, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor will not fall so many Dao Ancestors.

But if you dare to attack the Dao Ancestor himself, just wait for the revenge of the True Monarch and True Ancestor of the forces behind it.

Although the value of Ye Tian's obsidian was high, it was not high enough to make some Heavenly Monarchs take risks, after all, obsidian gold could not make them become true ancestors, so there was no need to work hard.

If Ye Tian had the opportunity to become a Dao Ancestor, I am afraid that they would do whatever it takes.

When Ye Tian announced the news of exchanging obsidian for Chaos Divine Power, some Heavenly Monarchs secretly contacted Ye Tian one after another, wanting to exchange it for Ye Tian's obsidian.

It's just that most of the Heavenly Monarchs don't have too high-level Chaos Divine Powers, and some are not even among the three thousand Chaos Divine Powers, but Ye Tian doesn't care about the strength of the Chaos Divine Powers, he just uses the Chaos Divine Powers to condense the prototype of the Great Dao.

For thousands of years, Ye Tian paid a lot of obsidian gold, and collected a total of thirteen Chaos Divine Powers, but unfortunately only seven of them belonged to the twelve major attribute Chaos Divine Powers.

These seven doors were all deliberately collected by Ye Tian, and they did not overlap with other Chaos Divine Powers.

Therefore, Ye Tian could cultivate these seven chaotic divine powers.

In addition, Ye Tian also spent a lot of obsidian gold to collect the corresponding high-level innate origin things, and he could cultivate immediately.

Originally, Ye Tian wanted to continue collecting, but he didn't wait for the arrival of the Heavenly Monarch for the next period of time, so he didn't wait any longer.

He estimated that there were only so many of the Celestial Monarch's chaotic supernatural powers in the Great Universe, and it was difficult to continue collecting them.

So, Ye Tian began to retreat and cultivate these seven chaotic supernatural powers.

10,000 years!

20,000 years!

30,000 years!

......

Before you know it, 80,000 years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already cultivated all the seven Chaos Divine Powers, and had condensed the prototypes of the Eight Great Dao, just because one of the Chaos Divine Powers was the Wings of Ice and Fire, which contained the Great Dao of Fire and the Great Dao of Ice, which happened to be the two attribute avenues.

However, Ye Tian's strength is still at the peak of the seven-star level, so his strength has not reached a qualitative change, although there are a few more prototypes of the Chaos Divine Power, but the quantity does not represent the quality, and it cannot allow him to step into the eight-star divine general.

Because he hadn't engraved the Dao pattern on the Void Heaven Dao Body yet.

At this moment, Ye Tian was very excited, because he had already gathered all the twelve attribute avenue prototypes.

Inside the Origin Bead.

The prototype of the Great Dao has turned into a 1,000-meter-long and 1,200-meter-wide Great Dao, and its power far exceeds that of other people's Great Dao Prototype, which can be the prototype of the Chaos Avenue formed by the fusion of 12 attribute avenues.

When the prototype of these 12 attribute avenues was fused together, an incomparably supreme chaotic avenue power manifested, representing the strength of this avenue.

At this moment, Ye Tian's foundation has been formed, and it is already the supreme foundation.

From then on, Ye Tian could continue to condense the prototypes of other avenues and merge them with this supreme foundation, which would only make the Chaos Dao progress towards the Endless Dao, making his Dao stronger and stronger.

"It's time to engrave the Dao Pattern, according to my estimate, if I engrave more than two Dao Patterns, my Void Heaven Dao Body will transform, and my strength will also be raised to the level of an eight-star god general!" Ye Tian estimated.

So, Ye Tian began to engrave the Dao pattern.

In the first 10,000 years, Ye Tian engraved his fifth Dao pattern, the Ice Dao Pattern.

In the second 10,000 years, Ye Tianming engraved his sixth Dao pattern, the Dao Pattern of Fire.

But the sixth Dao pattern inscription was completed, the power of the Void Heaven Dao Body skyrocketed, and the physical body was strong to an incomparably terrifying level, and Ye Tian's combat power also completed a breakthrough, breaking the shackles of the seven-star to eight-star god generals, and successfully becoming an eight-star god general.

And a few minutes before Ye Tian became an eight-star god general, there was an excited laugh from the Cloud Purple Palace.

"I, the Yunzi Divine Maiden, finally surpassed the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi and became an eight-star god general, and in one fell swoop, I surpassed the other three eight-star god generals and ranked first on the god general list!"

The Cloud Purple Divine Maiden was very happy, she was able to become the number one god general in the Great Universe, even more excited than the first god general list of the Chaos War God Palace, after all, this is a huge honor!

If her master knew, he would probably praise her too!

However, before she could get excited for a few minutes, another message came from a divine servant guarding the ancestral monument.

"What, Wanfa Daozi also broke through, stepped into the eight-star god general, and surpassed me, becoming the first ??? of the new god generals"

Yun Zi Divine Maiden's face was a little unsightly, she hadn't been on the top of the list for a few minutes before she was killed by Ye Tian.

Ye Tian: Is this deliberate?
